text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>7. Denen Herren Negotianten, welche das bekannte Wechsel-Buch: <BIBL><TITLE>La Banque rendue facile aux principales Nations de l'Europe</TITLE></BIBL> haben, zu wissen gethan, daß der Author desselben, <AUTHOR>M. Giraudeau</AUTHOR>, solches mit einem dritten Supplement vermehren, auch das gantze Werck, durch Subscriptionen zum zweyten mahl drucken lassen wird, wovon das Project bey Herrn Samuel Haag dem Buchbinder zu gelben Horn am Spahlenberg zu haben, auch bey ihme zu subscribiren ist.</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":6,"explanation":"The XML fragment was already well-formed, but the bibliographic markup around the author was semantically faulty: the author name should be tagged as an AUTHOR, not as a separate BIBL entry. I also normalized obvious OCR errors in the bibliographic title and author name, and corrected a few clear OCR corruptions in the surrounding text where they affected readability."}
